description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 17 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 23 mins. His tracked work was spread across 4 projects, and his time was spent mostly in Python, TypeScript, and Markdown, with some SQL and other languages. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repositories recorded this week.
